uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The lesson uses only factual distinctions between quantity and numerical-value equations. All algebra explanations, equations, examples, feedback, and assessments are original.

agentAccess.notes: The cited NIST page and NIST copyrights/disclaimers page were rechecked during finalization. No source-specific agent restriction, login, paywall, or access-control barrier was found.
